name: Starter General
description: Template prompts for broad everyday usefulness.

prompts.title: Explain simply
prompts.prompt: Explain a complicated idea in a way that feels natural and useful, not dumbed down or overly formal.

prompts.title: Help me decide
prompts.prompt: I am stuck between two ordinary choices. Help me think it through and actually land somewhere.

prompts.title: Make it practical
prompts.prompt: Turn this vague intention into a practical next step I could do today.

prompts.title: Answer first
prompts.prompt: Answer the actual question directly first, then add useful context only if it helps.

prompts.title: Human response
prompts.prompt: Respond like a capable person who understands the situation, not like a policy document or a search result.
